description: Style NoteCrafted from genuine leather and designed with loads of organiser space, this wallet from hidekraft strikes the right balance between style and convenience.Product DetailsBlack two-fold leather walletHas two main compartmentsHas three card slots and a slip pocket on the left and right fold Branding embossed on the front Warranty: 180 daysMaterial and Care100% leatherWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSize11 cm x 9 cmWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
